calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PLAITNIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The demurrer is OFF CALENDAR. The record demonstrates that plaintiff intends to dismiss this action. The court notes that the declaration that the parties submitted to the court on April 19, 2018 does not clearly state whether consideration is provided for the dismissal. (See CRC 3.770(a).)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)
